item.title: llm 0.31.1 摘要
item.description:
LLM 0.31.1 is a patch release that fixes a bug with OpenAI Chat Completion endpoints where a tool call with empty arguments could cause a JSON error from some providers. The issue was discovered while testing the llm-meta-ai plugin. This release ensures compatibility and stability for users interacting with OpenAI-compatible APIs.
标签: llm, openai, bug-fix, release, tool-call, json-error, compatibility

item.title: llm-meta-ai 0.1 摘要
item.description:
llm-meta-ai 0.1 is a new release that enables running prompts against Meta's muse-spark-1.1 model. This plugin integrates with the LLM tool, allowing users to leverage the latest AI model from Meta for various natural language processing tasks. The release is available on GitHub and supports the new Meta Model API.
标签: llm, meta, AI, release, plugin, muse-spark, natural-language-processing, API, open-source

item.title: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1 摘要
item.description:
Meta released Muse Spark 1.1, the first Spark model with an API, featuring improved agentic tool calling and computer use. The evaluation report highlights 'Attractor States in Self-Conversation,' where two model copies conversing produced existential statements. Simon Willison had preview access and created llm-meta-ai, a plugin for the LLM CLI tool, enabling easy access to the model via command line or Python. The plugin allows generating outputs like SVG images from text prompts.
标签: AI, Meta, Muse Spark, LLM, API, agentic, tool calling, computer use, CLI, plugin

item.title: Boxed In 摘要
item.description:
The article explores how creative limitations can become harmful, using the example of Paul Fusco, creator of the TV show ALF. Fusco's insistence on maintaining the illusion that ALF was a real alien—requiring trap doors, hidden puppeteers, and avoiding outdoor scenes—made production slow and tense, ultimately leading to the show's cancellation and limiting future opportunities for the character. The author reflects on how creative people often set rigid boundaries that can stifle growth and collaboration, suggesting that pride in one's vision should not prevent others from engaging with the work.
标签: creativity, limitations, ALF, TV production, puppetry, creative constraints, career, artistic integrity, collaboration, nostalgia

item.title: ★ John Ternus Should Reverse Apple’s Slide Down the Advertising Slippery Slope 摘要
item.description:
John Gruber revisits Tim Cook's 2014 privacy letter, noting Apple no longer hosts it. He argues Apple's privacy stance has eroded: ads now dominate App Store search, Apple News+ shows AI-generated ads, and Maps ads are coming. While Apple technically protects privacy (no tracking), most users won't believe it. Gruber contrasts Meta's forced AI data use, and suggests Apple should drop these ads to restore trust, as the Google search deal already generates huge ad revenue without reputational damage.
标签: Apple, privacy, advertising, Tim Cook, App Store, Apple Maps, Big Tech, user trust, surveillance capitalism, John Gruber

item.title: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI released GPT-5.6 in three sizes (Luna, Terra, Sol) with pricing from $1-$5 per million input tokens and $6-$30 for output. All models feature a February 2026 knowledge cutoff, 1M token context window, and 128K max output tokens. They claim superior agentic performance on Agents' Last Exam, beating Claude Fable 5 by up to 13.1 points, though Fable 5 outperforms on SWE-Bench Pro (80% vs 64.6%). New API features include programmatic tool calling, multi-agent support, prompt cache breakpoints, and original image detail level. Early impressions suggest Sol is competent but not clearly better than Fable for complex coding tasks.
标签: AI, OpenAI, GPT-5.6, LLM, agentic AI, AI pricing, benchmarks, API, tool calling, multi-agent

item.title: Apple’s Classic Mac Era Forays Into ‘Apps as Tiled Buttons’ Simplified Computing: At Ease and Launcher 摘要
item.description:
The article reflects on Apple's historical attempts at simplified, tiled-button app launchers in the classic Mac OS era. It highlights At Ease, a product sold in the System 7 era that provided a 'can't mess it up' baby computer mode, and Launcher, introduced in Mac OS 8 as a more power-user-oriented utility that anticipated modern launchers like Alfred and LaunchBar. The author notes they never used At Ease and only vaguely recall Launcher, contrasting these with third-party tools like DragThing.
标签: Apple, Mac OS, At Ease, Launcher, history, UI, app launcher, System 7, Mac OS 8, retro computing

item.title: Today’s the Day OpenAI Fucked Up the ChatGPT Mac App 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI announced major changes to its ChatGPT desktop app, rebranding the existing app as ChatGPT Classic and merging Codex into a new ChatGPT superapp that also includes ChatGPT Work and remnants of the discontinued Atlas browser. The new app is a 1.5 GB Electron bundle, significantly larger than the 159 MB native Classic app. Users can still install all three apps, but the new ChatGPT app is the recommended path forward. The changes have been criticized for bloat and loss of native Mac-like design.
标签: OpenAI, ChatGPT, Codex, desktop app, Electron, Mac, product update, bloatware, AI, software
